parameters.query:
WITH groupes AS (
  SELECT
    destinataire_benevole_id,
    destinataire_email,
    destinataire_prenom,
    changed_by_email,
    changed_by_prenom,
    changed_by_nom,
    MAX(changed_at) AS derniere_modif,
    array_agg(jsonb_build_object(
      'table', table_name,
      'champ', field_name,
      'avant', old_value,
      'apres', new_value
    ) ORDER BY changed_at) AS modifs,
    string_agg(id::text, ',') AS queue_ids_csv
  FROM notif_audit_queue
  WHERE processed = false
    -- Debounce 60s : on attend que la rafale de modifs soit terminée avant d'envoyer
    AND created_at < now() - interval '60 seconds'
    -- Limiter retries (eviter les boucles infinies si Resend down)
    AND retries < 5
  GROUP BY destinataire_benevole_id, destinataire_email, destinataire_prenom,
           changed_by_email, changed_by_prenom, changed_by_nom
  LIMIT 50
)
SELECT * FROM groupes;
